CustomField.description: Engine processing flag. False = the Tooling API has not yet been called to discover this component's child dependencies. True = the Tooling API fetch is complete for this node, or the node was intentionally marked done (circular node, dynamic reference, or max ancestor depth exceeded). The engine queries WHERE Has_Fetched_Dependencies__c = false to find pending work. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Has Fetched Dependencies
